reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Affordable and good quality food. Clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Poco personal y la cola al sol para cargar combustible impresionante

(Translated by Google)
Short staff and the queue in the sun to fill up with fuel is impressive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBazhibmxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
A pesar de estar abarrotado de gente y de ser las 4 de la tarde de un lunes feriado conseguimos comida sin problemas. Lo que su mucha demora para cargar combustible, motivado por ser una de las pocas estaciones en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
Despite being packed with people and it being 4 pm on a holiday Monday, we got food without any problems. The long wait for fuel was due to it being one of the few stations along the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcmYyeEh3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but the place gets so crowded that you end up wasting a lot of time.
